summary: Plan-only classification: #83538 remains the live canonical issue. #83933 is the linked candidate fix for the same cron manual-run deleteAfterRun root cause, but no merge or fixed-by closeout is planned because merge/fix actions are blocked for this job and the PR has a failing Real behavior proof check plus compatibility/session-state risk. #92002 is an already-closed unrelated LM Studio PR hydrated only as linked context.
